.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 11 instead of JDK 8 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 11.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in Java 9+ and removed in later versions; using 'release' is required for cross-compilation or targeting specific JDK features correctly.
